narrative:
Chagrin Falls-00-B (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,123 registered voters, with 53.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.2%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.9 percentage points.
